title: Ubiquiti UISP-Dish-Mini parabolic antenna, 26dBi, 5-7GHz
description: The Ubiquiti UISP Dish Mini is a well-designed parabolic antenna with a 420 mm diameter and a gain of 26 dBi . Its special WaveGuide adapter allows compatibility with Wave MLO5, airFiber 5XHD, and Rocket Prism units. The direct connection between the antenna and the radio eliminates the need for RF cables , simplifying installation, saving space on the mast, reducing signal loss, and minimizing the risk of water ingress The precisely engineered shape of the feed and dish allows for a total depth of just 21 cm (including the radio mount). The antenna supports a wide frequency range of 5150 â 6875 MHz . The bracket design enables easy mounting on masts with a diameter of 25 â 75 mm Antenna with feed WaveGuide adapter Mast mount
